payload.label: nightstand
payload.long_description: Front-facing dark brown wooden nightstand with three visible drawers and round brass knobs, worn/scuffed finish and visible wood grain, low rectangular profile on short legs; horizontally edge-cropped in the image; approximate distance from camera ~1.5 m.
